CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: V. Mack/. Ravinantapricha CSR: Leticia Perez.
Geoffrey A. Heaton, Esq. for Plaintiff NC Venture I, L.P.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants, Narayan Enterprises, Ashwani Kumar Thapar and Rita Thapar as follows:
Principal of $32,664.00
Costs of $689.30
Interest of $6,893.34 For the total of $40,246.64
Judgment signed in open court.
